policy: Verified positive and negative news feeds a bounded, time-decaying simulation overlay; base assumptions remain owner-controlled.

items.headline: O submits confidential S-1
items.summary: O reported submitting a confidential draft S-1 to the SEC, a key IPO-readiness signal that typically implies increased preparation for potential public markets.

items.headline: G raises $650M to scale inference cloud
items.summary: G announced $650M in new growth capital to accelerate GroqCloud expansion, supporting capacity scaling and inference-demand capture.
